typography.vernacular_support: Ensure system UI fallbacks for Hindi, Marathi, Kannada (e.g., Noto Sans Devanagari/Kannada)

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-[480px] mx-auto bg-[#faf6f0] min-h-screen relative shadow-2xl
layout_and_spacing.navigation: Fixed bottom tab bar. Uses thick icons. Must accommodate a large central FAB for Voice.
layout_and_spacing.fat_finger_touches: All interactive targets (buttons, list items) MUST be min-h-[56px] for easy tapping by rural users.

components.cards: Solid #ffffff surfaces with a delicate 1px border (#e8e1d7) and a very soft ambient shadow (shadow-sm). No glassmorphism as it reduces legibility in sunlight.

buttons.primary: bg-[#4a7c59] text-white rounded-2xl min-h-[56px] flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-lg w-full active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-[#faf6f0] border-2 border-[#4a7c59] text-[#4a7c59] rounded-2xl min-h-[56px] flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-lg w-full
buttons.voice_fab: Massive h-20 w-20 rounded-full bg-[#4a7c59] text-white shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(74,124,89,0.4)] flex items-center justify-center absolute bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 border-4 border-[#faf6f0]

components.voice_visualizer: Use concentric expanding circles (Ping animation in Tailwind) in #4a7c59 to indicate listening state.
components.testing: All interactive elements must include 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='voice-mic-btn').

motion.interactions: Focus on tactile touch states (`active:bg-[#f3eee5]` or `active:scale-[0.98]`) rather than hover states, as this is a mobile app.
motion.transitions: Keep animations under 200ms to feel snappy and responsive on lower-end devices.

icons.usage: Use thick, clear stroke-width (2.5) for high legibility in bright sunlight.

hero_farmer.description: Background for onboarding or weather dashboard hero area.

healthy_crop.description: Used as a success state placeholder for the Pest & Disease scan.

mandi_market.description: Thumbnail or background graphic for the Mandi/Market Prices section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly enforce the mobile-first max-w-[480px] container, centering it on desktop for a simulated mobile view (with shadow-2xl).
Always use the provided earthy color palette: Primary #4a7c59 and Background #faf6f0.
Ensure the bottom navigation is fixed, has a safe-area padding at the bottom, and features a prominent Voice FAB overlapping it.
Keep text large and legible. Contrast must be high for outdoor/sunlight visibility.
Use Manrope for headings and DM Sans for body.
Use 'data-testid' on all buttons and actionable elements.
Do not use complex 3D or heavy animations; prioritize fast loading, functional clarity, and fat-finger friendly touches.
